hero.title: Toys that spark
hero.description: Hand-picked toys for every age. Soft plush, classic wood, building sets, board games and more — all from brands parents trust.

footer.tagline: Toys that spark imagination — for tiny hands and bigger dreams.

wishlist.title: Your wishlist
wishlist.empty_desc: Tap the heart on any toy you love and it will land here. Your list stays in this browser even after you close the tab.

cart.title: Your cart
cart.empty_desc: Add a few toys and they will land here. The cart stays in this browser even after you close the tab.
cart.free_shipping_hint: Add {{amount}} Lei more for free shipping
cart.operator_will_call: An operator will call to confirm
cart.operator_contact: We will call you shortly to confirm.

auth.login_desc: Pick a role and the backend will issue you a 60-second JWT. Without one, the app falls back to mock data.
auth.api_missing: Backend not configured — set VITE_API_URL in your .env file (default: http://localhost:4000).
auth.token_note: Tokens last 60 seconds and are refreshed automatically.

desc.visitor: Read-only access — browse the catalog through the API.
desc.writer: Read plus create and update products.

not_found.title: Page not found
not_found.desc: The toy you were looking for must have rolled under the couch. Let's get you back to the shop.
